commit.message:
Fix dice detection: restore proven defaults, remove aggressive filtering

Recent changes (center-crop, center-weighted filtering, multi-threshold
consensus, low contrast threshold) collectively degraded detection.
Restore: C=15, erode=2 iterations, circularity=0.4, sequential fallback.
Remove center-weighted blob filtering. Set centerCrop default to 0.

fix(qa): notification scheduling, audio resilience, community screen layout

1. Fix reminder notifications never firing — the AxiosResponse.data
   wrapper was only unwrapped once instead of twice, leaving

   permanently configured. Add error handling and URL validation in
   playNewTrack to catch and log silent playback failures.

commit.message:
fix: explicitly set git remote credentials before push in sync-cli

claude-code-action resets the git credentials configured by
actions/checkout during its own operations. This causes git push
to fail with "Invalid username or token" even though the
SYNC_CLI_PR_TOKEN secret is valid and has push access.

Fix by calling git remote set-url with the token-authenticated
URL right before each git push, in both the normal and approve
PR-creation steps.

commit.message:
Remove raw protein data from CoS context to prevent LLM self-math

The LLM was ignoring pre-calculated 7-day averages and computing its own
incorrect weekly totals from raw data. This removes the weekly_summary dict,
strips protein_ fields from trends_7d, adds anti-math rules (Rules 6-7) to
the system prompt, and adds a post-response validator detecting weekly-total
language (critical severity).

commit.message:
v0.4.0 — Namespace static files and thin-wrapper template refactoring

Static files: Move core assets into static/smallstack/ to prevent
merge conflicts when downstream projects customize brand, CSS, or JS.
Upstream files now live at static/smallstack/{brand,css,js,help} and
downstream projects use static/{brand,css,js} for overrides.

Templates: Extract marketing content into smallstack/pages/ directory
and convert home.html, about.html, starter.html into thin wrappers
that {% include %} upstream content. Downstream projects replace the
include with their own markup — upstream updates land in pages/ and
never conflict.

Updates all BRAND_* setting defaults, context processor fallbacks,
{% static %} references (14 templates, ~24 edits), and documentation
(12 files) to reflect the new namespaced paths.

Fix build script keychain handling and signing flags

- Capture existing keychain list before any modifications so cleanup
  always restores it correctly (fixes keychain list being wiped on exit)
- Remove CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY override that conflicted with automatic signing
- Add -allowProvisioningUpdates and -allowProvisioningDeviceRegistration
- Make xcpretty optional, falling back to raw output if not installed
- Make Developer ID cert import optional for local builds

commit.message:
fix: add SHA-256 dedup to builder and packer to eliminate duplicate samples

Builder (build_golden_dataset.py):
- Replace weak text[:200] prefix dedup with full-text SHA-256 hash
- Add content-level dedup that strips translation prompt framing to catch
  same translation pair across BPCC/IN22-Gen/FLORES+ datasets

Packer (pack_golden_dataset.py):
- Add pre-packing raw sample dedup (SHA-256 hash of decoded text)
- Add post-packing record dedup to remove identical packed bins
- Regenerate golden_packed_512.jsonl and preview MD

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Compacted footer: reduced padding, logo size, and grid gap
- Added .page-hero-banner CSS for inner page headers

agent directly in the report page, below the editable sections:

Increase max_tokens to 512 and require justifications (#75)

- Bump max_tokens from 300 to 512 to prevent OpenRouter/others from
  truncating responses mid-JSON (was the root cause of parse failures)
- Reject ratings that parse but have empty justifications
- Both consensus and vitality paths updated

commit.message:
refactor: troca SMTP por Resend API para envio de emails

Só precisa de RESEND_API_KEY (free tier 100 emails/dia).
Remove dependência de SMTP_HOST/USER/PASS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: waterfall labels — custom renderer + Y-axis headroom for floating bars

Labels were clipped at chart ceiling because stacked bar position="top"
places labels at cumulative stack top (invisible base + visible segment).
Now uses custom label renderer positioned 6px above visible segment, with
12% Y-axis headroom to ensure labels never clip.
